tluaRepeatUntil.tlua(17,10): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'secret'.


==== tluaRepeatUntil.tlua (1 errors) ====
    declare function poll(): number | nil;
    
    // Body locals are visible in the until-condition.
    function bodyLocal(n: number): number
      repeat
        local step = n - 1;
        n = step;
      until step <= 0;
      return n;
    end
    
    // ...but not after the loop.
    function afterLoop(): number
      repeat
        local secret = 1;
      until true;
      return secret;
             ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'secret'.
    end
    
    // break exits; continue targets the condition.
    function loops(n: number): number
      local total = 0;
      repeat
        n = n - 1;
        if n == 3 then
          continue;
        end
        if n <= 0 then
          break;
        end
        total = total + n;
      until false;
      return total;
    end
    
    // One-liner form.
    function once(): number
      local n = 0;
      repeat n = n + 1 until n > 0;
      return n;
    end
    
    // Nested repeat.
    function nested(n: number): number
      repeat
        repeat
          n = n - 1;
        until n <= 10;
      until n <= 0;
      return n;
    end
